market: Polymarket Hong Kong Observatory Jun 8 highest temperature 30C YES
sizing_rationale: Small third same-thesis paper add because station-specific evidence materially strengthened, but existing HKO 30C exposure and resolution/rounding risk keep size capped.
thesis: HKO regional readings at 18:50 HKT show HK Observatory max since midnight at 30.9C and current temperature at 28.3C. Heavy showers/thunderstorm context and near-zero late-day solar make a late 31.0C+ print less likely, while visible Polymarket pricing still implies only about 31-32%.
invalidation_risks: Final HKO/Wunderground/Polymarket resolution could round 30.9C into 31C; an unobserved or later 31.0C+ print could appear; HKO regional data is provisional; browser-visible Polymarket prices may be stale or not executable; this is correlated with existing HKO 30C paper entries.
